name: Ambulatory / Preventive Visit Codes
description: CPT codes for ambulatory and preventive care visits including office/outpatient E&M visits, preventive medicine services, and counseling. Used across multiple HEDIS measures for encounter identification and continuous care tracking.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets
